name: pi-shipshape
description: Pi package for the Shipshape context-isolated spec-driven development workflow.
readme:
# Estelle

A Shipshape-native coding agent CLI that runs [Pi](https://github.com/dmytri/pi) with Shipshape skills, context controls, model policy, and extension wiring.

## What Estelle does

- Runs as a Pi extension inside normal conversational Pi chat
- Starts in **Captain** mode — the only role that talks to the user
- Automatically transitions to QM/Crew/Bosun with enforced context isolation
- Constrains role tool permissions (Captain can't edit code, QM can't edit specs, etc.)
- Installs Shipshape skills and a subagent extension so QM can spawn Crew
- Provides `init` and `doctor` CLI commands for setup and health checks

## Quick start

```bash
npx estelle init --yes --json
npx estelle
```

## Shipshape workflow

Estelle implements the [Shipshape](https://github.com/dmytri/shipshape) spec-driven development workflow:

1. **Captain** — human-facing discovery, durable specs, and role transitions
2. **QM** — fresh-context verification from specs only (no Captain chat leakage)
3. **Crew** — focused implementation of one failing target
4. **Bosun** — repo hygiene, verification recheck, local commit custody

Only Captain talks to the user. Internal roles run automatically with constrained tools and isolated context.

## Configuration

`npx estelle init` creates:

- `.estelle/config.json`
- `.estelle/context-policy.json`
- `.estelle/model-policy.json`
- `.estelle/extensions.json`
